threats.injection_magnitude: DecimalString and ConversionEngine reject non-numeric and oversized magnitude before DB use.
threats.malicious_unit_expression: UcumParser allows only governed atoms/operators and enforces length and atom-count limits.
threats.alias_poisoning: External aliases resolve through uom_alias/uom_external_code_map or uom_alias_quarantine.
threats.privilege_escalation: Preview/list/read are separate from submit/review/approve/esign/manifest/link policies.
threats.replay_esign: UomWorkflowService and manifest service require human actor, permission, meaning, and immutable audit.
threats.stale_cache: Rule cache key includes from/to/as_of/context/policy; workflow invalidates known rule-pair cache keys.
threats.event_spoofing: P10 event contracts require event_id, event_type, occurred_at, actor/source fields, and trace_id.

alerts.response: freeze auto-acceptance, review source_system, sample raw aliases, open metrology review

cache_contract.invalidation: workflow activation invalidates known rule pair keys; multi-node invalidation remains controlled gap unless Redis/RabbitMQ event fanout is configured

benchmark_contract.claim_scope: local micro-benchmark evidence only, not production SLO

replay_contract.restore_expectation: conversion result must be reproducible after restore using rule version and effective date
